questions.question: Which OSI layer is responsible for translating data between application formatting and network encoding?
At which OSI layer do network routers primarily operate to forward packages?
What is the exact Protocol Data Unit (PDU) name processed at Layer 2 of the OSI model?
What is the primary role of a demilitarized zone (DMZ) inside an enterprise network layout?
answers: To isolate public-facing servers from the secure internal private network infrastructure
To store system application logs data fields away from internet paths
To host local user database management tables securely
To balance bandwidth distributions across edge switch routing points

questions.question: What type of firewall monitors the state of active connections to determine whether to block a packet?
How does Asymmetric Encryption handle session key setup operations?
answers: It hashes password strings using random salt variables
It uses a public key to encrypt data and a matching separate private key to decrypt it
It relies on a single shared symmetric key rotated periodically
It restricts traffic lanes to specific local MAC configurations

questions.question: What type of intrusion occurs when an attacker intercepts and modifies communications between two endpoints?
What is the standard port allocation value for secure SSH remote shell terminal sessions?
What occurs when a TCP host triggers a Reset (RST) flag parameter inside its header field?
answers: The connection is instantly terminated due to an unrecoverable error mismatch condition
The pipeline starts a context synchronization sequence
The receiver reports that a data segment contains corrupt checksum blocks
The sender requests a temporary pause in traffic flow

questions.question: What does the 'Sliding Window' mechanism accomplish inside a TCP session tracking pipeline?
answers: Cryptographic block rotations to shield payload fields
Horizontal expansion of port bounds when traffic spikes occur
Dynamic flow control to regulate how much data a sender can transmit before an ACK is required
